doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document makes critically false legal claims (asserting tenants must vacate without a court proceeding, which contradicts actual Illinois eviction law), and no verifiable HUD/Illinois AG co-issued document matching reference TRF-2026-IL
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains critically false and misleading legal claims — under Illinois law, a 5-day pay-or-quit notice does NOT require a tenant to vacate without a court proceeding; the landlord must still file an eviction (forcible entry and detainer) lawsuit and obtain a court judgment before a tenant is legally obligated to leave — and no such HUD/Illinois AG co-issued document with reference TRF-2026-IL exists as verified institutional material.
